mapper.sql: teach_book_manage_idx, homepage_id, teach_idx, student_idx, student_name, web_id, student_birth, applicant_cell_phone, teach_status, teach_type, teach_date, TO_CHAR(add_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS add_date, add_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TEACH_BOOK_MANAGE ( teach_book_manage_idx, homepage_id, teach_idx, student_idx, student_name, web_id, student_birth, applicant_cell_phone, teach_status, teach_type, teach_date, add_date, add_id ) SELECT TEACH_BOOK_MANAGE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, homepage_id, teach_idx, student_idx, student_name, CASE WHEN s.apply_type = 'CMS' THEN s.member_id ELSE s.web_id END AS web_id, student_birth, applicant_cell_phone, '1', #{teach_type}, #{teach_date}, SYSDATE, #{add_id} FROM STUDENT s WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND teach_idx = #{teach_idx} AND apply_status in ('1', '2', '5') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT tbm.web_id FROM TEACH_BOOK_MANAGE tbm WHERE tbm.web_id = CASE WHEN s.apply_type = 'CMS' THEN s.member_id ELSE s.web_id END AND tbm.teach_idx = s.teach_idx AND tbm.homepage_id = s.homepage_id AND TRUNC(tbm.add_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TEACH_BOOK_MANAGE WHERE teach_idx = #{teach_idx} AND qr_count = #{qr_count} AND TRUNC(add_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE TEACH_BOOK_MANAGE SET teach_type = #{teach_type}, teach_status = #{teach_status}, teach_date = SYSDATE WHERE teach_idx = #{teach_idx} AND student_name = #{student_name} AND applicant_cell_phone = #{applicant_cell_phone} AND TRUNC(add_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM TEACH_BOOK_MANAGE WHERE teach_idx = #{teach_idx} ORDER BY student_name, add_date desc, teach_date desc
